name: Block1_LdRegReg
comment: LD r, r' — 01_ddd_sss. The 3-bit register fields use the LR35902 lookup B/C/D/E/H/L/(HL)/A. Three formats in priority order capture the (HL)-as-destination, (HL)-as-source, and reg-to-reg variants. HALT (0x76) is shadowed by the higher-priority Halt format declared in block1-halt.json.

formats.name: LdHlInd_Reg
formats.comment: 01_110_sss — store register sss to memory[HL]. sss=110 is HALT (handled separately).

formats.name: LdReg_HlInd
formats.comment: 01_ddd_110 — load memory[HL] into register ddd. ddd=110 would be LD (HL),(HL) which is HALT (shadowed).

formats.name: LdReg_Reg
formats.comment: 01_ddd_sss general reg-to-reg. The (HL) cases are caught by higher-priority formats above; HALT is caught even earlier in block1-halt.json.
